summary: Excellent audience tape that shines especially on the first set, earning near‑perfect marks from listeners.
review: Both reviewers rate this show very highly – one calling it a nearly 5‑star performance with particular love for the first set, and another awarding a full 5 stars while praising the mysterious wizardry of Jim Wise’s recording. The audience source captures the concert well enough to be described as an “Excellent AUD,” indicating clear and engaging sound despite the lack of detailed technical commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic reviews (4‑ and 5‑star) highlight strong musical performance—especially the first set—and a high‑quality audience recording, justifying a rating in the upper‑range despite limited detail.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as an “Excellent AUD” with no reported flaws; sound appears clear enough to earn near‑perfect scores.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set singled out for particular excellence; overall performance regarded very positively.
